title: koanophyllon gracilipes
intro: Koanophyllon gracilipes, also known as the yellow-flowering rockrose, is a plant species in the family Asteraceae. The plant is used in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant properties. The health benefits of Koanophyllon gracilipes include its ability to treat various ailments such as fever, skin issues, and respiratory problems. Herbal preparations of the plant are often made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, which can be used to reap its medicinal and health benefits.
